episodes.1-2: Meet-cute – quirky accident or forced situation introduces leads.
episodes.3-4: Bickering & First Misunderstanding – comedic tension builds.
episodes.5-8: Fake dating / Contract marriage / Rival appears, jealousy sparks.
episodes.9-10: Feelings Deepen – first kiss, hidden vulnerability revealed.
episodes.13-15: Realization – love confession, rival backs off, obstacles removed.
episodes.16: Happy Ending – wedding, proposal, or lighthearted epilogue.

episodes.1-2: Tender Beginnings – innocent love or reunion of childhood friends.
episodes.3-6: Conflict Rising – secrets, hidden illness, tragic backstories revealed.
episodes.7-8: Turning Point – accident, amnesia, betrayal, or breakup.
episodes.9-12: Emotional Struggle – illness worsens, rival gains ground, family pressures.
episodes.13-15: Sacrifice – one lead pulls away to protect the other, tragedy looms.
episodes.16: Bittersweet Ending – tearful farewell, death, or time skip reunion.

episodes.1-2: World-Building – introduce supernatural being (alien, goblin, ghost).
episodes.3-4: Mortal Meets Immortal – clashing personalities, comical tension.
episodes.5-8: Powers & Secrets – backstory revealed, enemies introduced.
episodes.9-10: Destiny Connection – reincarnation, fated love, cosmic twist.
episodes.11-13: Crisis – hero must leave Earth, fight villain, or protect loved one.
episodes.14-15: Sacrifice – disappearance, memory erased, near-death event.
episodes.16: Resolution – reunion, eternity together, or open-ended fate.

episodes.1-2: Setup – introduce hero’s mission, revenge goal, or undercover role.
episodes.3-4: Inciting Incident – crime, betrayal, or personal loss sparks journey.
episodes.5-8: Allies & Enemies – love interest introduced, rival forces clash.
episodes.9-10: Midpoint Betrayal – shocking twist, trust broken, double agent revealed.
episodes.11-13: Race Against Time – conspiracies deepen, truth uncovered.
episodes.16: Resolution – justice served, reconciliation, or bittersweet farewell.
